---
title: equation-anchors
format: html
filters:
  - d-morrison/equation-anchors
---

This extension adds permalink anchors to display equations.

Use `quarto add d-morrison/equation-anchors` in your Quarto project, then
enable the filter:

```yaml
filters:
  - d-morrison/equation-anchors
```

See [example.qmd](example.qmd) for a minimal working example, or open the
[rendered example page](example.html).
